headline: Not All Luxury Is Created Equal: Realtor.com® Maps 7 Levels of the High-End Market, From $680K to $75 Million
summary: As million-dollar price tags have become more common across the country, a new Realtor.com® report finds that in many markets, $1 million still buys something different: luxury. Realtor.com®'s 7 Levels of Luxury report maps the high-end market from Huntsville, Ala., where top-tier homes start near $759,000, to Aspen, Colo., where the 90th percentile of listings begins at nearly $25 million, revealing a luxury market that operates less like a single category and more like seven distinct ones.
